  • Method Details

    • addWdToValidityTerm

      protected JTerm addWdToValidityTerm(JTerm validity, JTerm[] updates, List<LocationVariable> heaps, Map<LocationVariable, Function> anonOutHeaps, ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> localInVariables, ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> localOutVariables, BlockContract bc, AuxiliaryContractBuilders.GoalsConfigurator configurator, Services services, TermBuilder tb)
      Parameters:
      validity - the validity formula.
      updates - the updates.
      heaps - the heaps.
      anonOutHeaps - the heaps used in the anonOut update.
      localInVariables - the free local variables in the block.
      localOutVariables - the free local variables modifiable by the block.
      bc - the contract being applied.
      configurator - a goal configurator
      services - services.
      tb - a term builder.
      Returns:
      the conjunction of the well-definedness formula and the validity formula.

    • setUpValidityTerm

      protected JTerm setUpValidityTerm(List<LocationVariable> heaps, Map<LocationVariable, Function> anonHeaps, Map<LocationVariable, Function> anonOutHeaps, ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> localInVariables, ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> localOutVariables, ProgramVariable exceptionParameter, JTerm[] assumptions, JTerm[] postconditions, JTerm[] updates, BlockContract bc, AuxiliaryContractBuilders.ConditionsAndClausesBuilder conditionsAndClausesBuilder, AuxiliaryContractBuilders.GoalsConfigurator configurator, Services services, TermBuilder tb)
      Overrides:
      setUpValidityTerm in class FunctionalBlockContractPO
      Parameters:
      heaps - the heaps.
      anonHeaps - the heaps used in the anonIn update.
      anonOutHeaps - the heaps used in the anonOut update.
      localInVariables - the free local variables in the block.
      localOutVariables - the free local variables modifiable by the block.
      exceptionParameter - the exception variable.
      assumptions - the preconditions.
      postconditions - the postconditions.
      updates - the update.
      bc - the contract being applied.
      conditionsAndClausesBuilder - a conditions and clauses builder.
      configurator - a goal configurator.
      services - services.
      tb - a term builder.
      Returns:
      the validity formula for the contract.

    • setUpWdGoal

      public static JTerm setUpWdGoal(@Nullable Goal goal, BlockContract contract, JTerm update, JTerm anonUpdate, LocationVariable heap, Function anonHeap, ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> localIns, Services services, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, PosInOccurrence occurrence)
      Parameters:
      goal - If this is not null, the returned formula is added to this goal.
      contract - the contract being applied.
      update - the update.
      anonUpdate - the anonymization update.
      heap - the heap.
      anonHeap - the anonymization heap.
      localIns - all free local variables in the block.
      variables -
      occurrence -
      Returns:
      the well-definedness formula.
